listings.title: CaseLight is looking for a U
listings.description: CaseLight is looking for a U.S.-based developer for a 20–25% equity partnership. Investigators across legal, corporate, insurance, and private sectors are stuck with enterprise case management platforms charging $100+ per seat with 20-seat minimums and lengthy contracts just for their basic package. Meanwhile, 50,000 small investigative agencies, 100,000 corporate/insurance investigators, and 400,000 small-firm attorneys are forced into a patchwork of Word, Excel, Canva, Hunchly, and half a dozen disconnected apps just to get basic casework done. It destroys workflow and breaks evidence integrity. CaseLight solves this by building a secure case management and evidence retention system where cases live on the investigator’s hardware, data never leaves their control, metadata stays intact, nothing gets overwritten, and there’s no cloud or subscription trap. Pricing is $50/month to intentionally disrupt a market way overdue for it, and we already have investigators ready to adopt once the system is fully hardened. This isn’t SaaS or hype; it’s durable infrastructure built for people who actually handle evidence. I’ve already done the major lift — prototype, architecture, workflows, UX, and core logic. What’s left is tuning, hardening, and security work. I need a developer who understands durable systems, crash recovery, data integrity, metadata preservation, and security as a baseline. If you’ve built systems where failure is unacceptable and data protection is non-negotiable, we should talk. Company: https://getcaselight.com Founder: https://www.linkedin.com/in/charles-eklof/ Reply here: charles@getcaselight.com

listings.title: Hey HN! Air Space Intelligence ( https://www
listings.description: Hey HN! Air Space Intelligence ( https://www.airspace-intelligence.com ) is hiring in Boston. We're a frontier AI and product company for critical industries and defense, backed by a16z. Last week, the FAA awarded us a 12-year, $875M contract to build FMDS and SMART - the flow-management and airspace optimization systems that will become the technological backbone of the FAA's Air Traffic Control. What we ship in the next two years will define how this country moves through the sky for the next fifty. At the core is one of the largest real-time optimization problems in the world: how do you safely sequence ~40,000 flights/day while routing around weather, military airspace, equipment outages, and constant real-world churn? The system has to be right every time, and reliable at scale. More here: https://www.faa.gov/newsroom/modern-skies-trumps-transportat... We're hiring across Backend, Infrastructure, and Frontend (ICs and Tech Leads). One of our roles (with a small puzzle at the bottom that routes to my email): https://www.airspace-intelligence.com/careers/role?=1336c828 ... — include "HackerNews" in the subject so I can prioritize. If you want a problem that is genuinely hard, consequential, and urgent — this is the moment to reach out.

listings.title: Quantum Rise | Chicago or NYC (preferred), Remote for the right candidate | Full-time | No visa sponsorship | https://ww
listings.description: Quantum Rise | Chicago or NYC (preferred), Remote for the right candidate | Full-time | No visa sponsorship | https://www.quantumrise.com/ Quantum Rise is an AI-forward consulting startup serving the mid-market in the US. We see companies in multiple industries struggling to understand how to leverage artificial intelligence in their day-to-day operations, trying to understand what their existing workforce now needs to know, or trying to understand whether they're about to be disrupted and need to change how their existing processes work. Many have business problems which "traditional" machine learning could help with even prior to the current GenAI hype cycle, but for whatever reason hadn't prioritized doing until now. Many have employees looking to incorporate agentic AI safely and effectively across different business areas. We try and help getting a handle around these issues and designing outcome-driven solutions. Agentic AI Solutions Manager: You'll work directly with clients to benchmark, train and deploy agentic systems for industry-specific problems. We're looking for someone deeply embedded in agentic engineering practice across vendors and platforms. Companies are looking for ways to leverage agentic systems to upskill their practitioners and need help navigating a new, powerful scary world. AI Solutions Engineer: You're someone who has experience across the entire spectrum of applied automation, machine learning and agentic engineering. We think of these two roles as complementary -- agentic AI solutioners help clients understand the forefront, whereas pure AI solutioners help them pick the right solution not the one they saw in the news. Both are front-facing development roles for someone who loves both tech and tackling real business problems. We love people with prior experience in multiple industries. To apply, send me an email at julian.berman at quantumrise.com, mentioning HN and including your CV.

listings.title: Stanford Research Computing | Stanford, CA (next to Palo Alto) | Full-time | Three positions | HYBRID,ONSITE Stanford Re
listings.description: Stanford Research Computing | Stanford, CA (next to Palo Alto) | Full-time | Three positions | HYBRID,ONSITE Stanford Research Computing ( https://srcc.stanford.edu ) is a collaboration between University IT and the Vice Provost and Dean of Research. We operate HPC environments for researchers, we do one-time consultations on projects (from software and pipelines, to data management, to physical building design and fit-out), and we provide contract support for individual Labs, Departments, and Schools. We have four open positions, three hybrid and one (marked) onsite: • Principal Storage Architect & Team Lead: Our current storage team lead is moving on to Industry, so we're splitting his work into two separate roles. This is the Technical Manager position: You'll be leading the storage team, setting the direction for our large storage environments: Oak (file storage, used by multiple cluster), Fir (fast scratch for Sherlock), and Elm (object storage on top of tape). Knowledge of Lustre, Infiniband, and PB-scale storage is important. More info: https://bit.ly/44PbQnr • Storage Architect or Storage Sysadmin: This is the second role I referenced above. You'll be maintaining & expanding Oak, our 20+ Pebibyte Lustre storage environment used by our largest HPC clusters. Depending on your experience level, you might also have some responsibility for Elm, which provides object storage on top of tape. Knowledge of Lustre, Infiniband, and PB-scale storage is important here, too. More info: https://bit.ly/4y8lj6R • GPU Cluster Sysadmin: With Marlowe—our 1SU NVIDIA DGX H100 SuperPOD with DDN Intelliflash and DDN NFS storage—launched, we have decided to hire an additional sysadmin! You'll be working with the latest AI/ML/Deep Learning/LLM software & frameworks, getting them to work in an HPC environment. You'll be keeping the environment up-to-date, and working with NVIDIA/DDN when there's trouble. You should also expect to interact with users & PIs a lot. More info: https://bit

listings.description: Kinxshn | Forward Deployed Engineer - backend - python | REMOTE (Europe) | Full time | Funded We build AI agents that run real operations. Humans talk to our agents to run commercial real estate: leases, contractors, invoicing, accounting. We're live in production across several European jurisdictions, with real customers and real money. We need a Forward Deployed Engineer to own a client-facing use case end to end: a strong backend engineer who is also the face of the team to the customer. The job: - Talk to clients directly and often. Pull requirements out of messy conversations, explain tradeoffs, own the relationship - Turn jurisdiction-specific lease rules, tax and accounting mappings, client-specific workflows into tools our agents call - Ship to production in your first month, then keep it alive What we need, in this order: 1. Self-driven, real ownership. You'll have a lot of freedom and support, but the use case is yours end to end - nobody will be feeding you tickets. 2. Excellent English and real customer-facing experience. You'll be on client calls every week. 3. Serious backend experience. You've shipped and operated production systems, and can work as the only engineer in the room. We use AI tools heavily, but we don't vibe code: your engineering judgment and review are what make the code shippable, and you own what you merge. 4. LLM agents in production, or you ramp fast: tool calling, evals, knowing when a plain deterministic tool beats a model call. Bonus, not required: containers and CI/CD, RBAC and auditing, LangChain/LangGraph, operator or consulting background. We're a small senior team across Europe and South America. For this role we need you in Europe. Competitive comp - we have no salary bands, for the right person we'll stretch. Apply: mercedes@kinxshn.com, subject "HN - Forward Deployed Engineer", salary expectation and CV attached - skip the skills inventory: tell us about something hard you shipped and a customer you made happy.

listings.description: Namecoach/Euphonia | Founding Voice AI Engineer (part-time, path to CAIO) | SF or Remote | REMOTE | Contract / Part-time, ~$30-120/hr by seniority, potentially converting to FT Namecoach has spent 10 years building the largest verified pronunciation dataset of its kind: ~2M self-recorded name pronunciations, plus a large corpus of human-verified phonetic spellings. We're now building Euphonia ( https://euphonia.namecoach.ai/ ), a provider-neutral middleware layer that makes any TTS engine pronounce names, acronyms, and other out-of-vocabulary terms correctly. The new wave of TTS (models from OpenAI, ElevenLabs, etc) sounds great but gives you almost no phoneme-level control, so it gets lots of names and words wrong and you can't easily fix it. We sit in front of these engines and fix it. We want real depth in speech and phonetics: grapheme-to-phoneme, IPA, ASR/TTS internals, and the ability to build and evaluate models around them (the recognition and G2P side especially). You should be comfortable shipping with agentic dev tools like Claude Code and Cursor. This is a 0 to 1 founding voice AI engineering role with a genuine path to Chief AI Officer for the right person. Part-time to start (flexible hours, ~2hr/day overlap with US Pacific), with a paid take-home and a paid trial month before anything longer term. Potential conversion to full-time role. Series A closed, bridge to B in motion. Full JD: https://wellfound.com/l/2ChdJ2 Email hiring+hn@name-coach.com with a short note on what interests you and a link to something you've built. G2P / TTS / ASR open-source work gets read first.

listings.title: Servicing Copilot | Senior Full-Stack Contractor | REMOTE (EST overlap required) | $5k paid bake-off → ~6 month contract
listings.description: Servicing Copilot | Senior Full-Stack Contractor | REMOTE (EST overlap required) | $5k paid bake-off → ~6 month contract | CAD $130-180/hr I'm building an AI-native operations tool for private mortgage lenders. MVP targets two workflows that eat servicing staff time: NSF collections follow-up and renewal management. I run a Canadian private lender as my day job, so the product is built against a real shop with real data and real users. Self-funded. No VCs, no board. The data model is locked (20 tables, multi-tenant by lender_id, idempotent CSV imports, append-only event log). Wireframes in progress. Hiring one engineer for the full ~6-month build via a paid bake-off: $5k flat for ~1 week of work, 2-3 candidates in parallel, winner takes the engagement. Losing candidates get paid in full and keep their work. Trial scope: CSV loan tape import with idempotent upsert + audit, one case detail screen, one LLM call classifying a borrower email reply with structured output, activity log driven by case events. Stack is contractor's choice — Postgres required, Next.js + TS or Python + React expected. Looking for senior generalists with real production LLM experience (structured outputs, evals, failure modes — not side-project tier) and strong relational data modeling judgment. Opinions you'll defend in writing. Email: info@readifinancial.com with: one paragraph on why this interests you, 1-2 links to shipped work involving a real schema + LLM in production, your rate and availability, and one question about the project. No cover letters. Search terms: postgres, multi-tenant, LLM, OpenAI, Anthropic, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, fintech, vertical SaaS, founding engineer, contract, Canada

listings.description: Trax | Analytics Engineer | REMOTE CST (Philippines, Costa Rica, US) | Full-time Contract We're hiring an Analytics Engineer to help power our future. listings.title: Designer Residential
listings.description: NORR is a global team of 800 architects, engineers, planners, and interior designers creating design strategies and solutions that express the unique vision of every project. Driven by a common purpose with our clients and partners, we share ideas to create and innovate, bringing people, design, and technologies together to think bigger and act bolder. Our story began in 1938 and has evolved into an employee-owned, fully integrated firm committed to sustainable development goals across 13 market sectors in Canada, the US, and UK. Design excellence continues to guide everything we do. At NORR, our residential portfolio spans decades and project types. Our approach to multi-family residential design supports smart growth and walkable neighborhoods with building wellness initiatives, integrated carbon-reduction strategies, innovative construction technologies, and resilient infrastructure. Every solution is guided by principles of design excellence, urban regeneration, inclusive context, and marketability. Learn more about our Residential Portfolio. As a Designer, you will work with other members of the design team in order to develop design solutions appropriate to the context, budget and aesthetic requirements of architectural projects. listings.title: Videographer
listings.description: Gritter Francona is looking for a Videographer that will be responsible for capturing, producing, and editing high-quality video content supporting the Veterans Health Administration (VHA) National Center for PTSD's educational media initiatives. The Videographer films task-related events, interviews, presentations, and supplemental footage used in the development of animated and live-action educational products and may perform post-production editing to create final deliverable products. Working collaboratively with project managers, video producers, scriptwriters, subject matter experts (SMEs), animated graphic/visual artists, and Government stakeholders, the Videographer ensures that all video content supports the National Center for PTSD's mission to provide evidence-based, accessible, and trauma-informed educational resources. Video products must accurately convey scientific and clinical information while maintaining a serious, compassionate, and hopeful tone that encourages treatment engagement among Veterans, trauma survivors, caregivers, healthcare providers, and the general public. Key Responsibilities Film task-related events, interviews, presentations, demonstrations, and other project activities as required to support educational video production Capture high-quality video and audio using professional production equipment while ensuring appropriate lighting, framing, composition, and sound quality Coordinate with project managers, video producers, and Government stakeholders to plan filming activities, production schedules, and location logistics Review scripts, storyboards, production plans, and creative direction to ensure video footage aligns with project objectives and educational messaging Operate and maintain cameras, audio recording equipment, lighting systems, tripods, and other production equipment Perform post-production editing, including sequencing, color correction, audio enhancement, graphics integration, captioning, and rendering final del

The Video Producer oversees all phases of production, from project initiation through final delivery, ensuring that video products are completed on schedule, meet quality standards, and comply with contractual requirements. Working collaboratively with project managers, scriptwriters, subject matter experts (SMEs), animated graphic/visual artists, voice talent, editors, and Government stakeholders, the Video Producer ensures that each production effectively communicates evidence-based information about trauma, posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD), effective treatments, and co-occurring conditions. Bei uns entstehen Systeme, die in Produktion gehen und Geld verdienen oder sparen. PoCs für die Schublade machen andere. Wir bauen hier ein Unternehmen, das in den nächsten Jahren weiter wachsen wird. Wachstum ist aber nicht unser Ziel, sondern die Folge. Unser Anspruch ist Top-Qualität bei jedem Projekt, und genau deshalb wachsen wir gerade. Founder-led, mit kurzen Wegen und ohne Konzern-Politik. Dafür brauchen wir Verstärkung. Und zwar für eine Rolle, die zwei Welten verbindet: Einerseits baust du performante AI-Systeme und gleichzeitig trägst du die technische Projektleitung. In manchen Projekten liegt dein Schwerpunkt auf der Umsetzung, in anderen auf der Leitung. Wie sich das mischt, gibt das Projekt vor. Aufgaben Engineering: Du konzipierst und baust AI-Systeme von der Architektur bis ins Deployment, mit Fokus auf LLM-Anwendungen, RAG und Agentic Workflows Du entwickelst skalierbare Backend-Services und APIs in Python, meistens mit FastAPI Du bringst Cloud-AI-Services in Produktion, bevorzugt auf Microsoft Azure, je nach Projekt auch AWS oder GCP Technisches Projektmanagement: Du verantwortest die Umsetzung und Qualität der Lösung, durch Scoping des Umfangs, Architekturentscheidungen, Schreiben von Tickets und Steuerung der Umsetzung Mit Blick auf die Projektumsetzung bist du der/die technische Ansprechpartner:in des Kunden Du sicherst Qualität durch Tests, Evaluation und Monitoring Qualifikation Fundierte Erfahrung in der Entwicklung mit Python Praktische Erfahrung mit Machine-Learning-Modellen und Large Language Models Erfahrung mit Cloud-Plattformen, bevorzugt Microsoft Azure, alternativ AWS oder GCP Erfahrung darin, Projekte zu leiten und mit Stakeholdern zu kommunizieren Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift Ein Studium oder eine Ausbildung in Informatik, Mathematik, Data Science oder einem verwandten B

listings.title: Werkstudent Sales (m/w/d)
listings.description: Du hast Freude am Vertrieb und möchtest Kunden nicht nur am Telefon, sondern auch persönlich beraten? Als Werkstudent Sales unterstützt du uns beim Aufbau unserer B2B-Pipeline und übernimmst Beratungstermine in unserem Berliner Showroom. Unabhängig davon, ob du bereits erste Vertriebserfahrung mitbringst oder als motivierter Einsteiger durchstarten willst: Bei uns bekommst du Ownership, eine steile Lernkurve und ein Umfeld, in dem Entwicklung gefördert wird. Note: Diese Position ist im Raum Berlin zu besetzen. Outbound mit Wirkung: Du identifizierst potenzielle B2B-Kunden, gehst aktiv in den Erstkontakt und legst damit den Grundstein für neue Kundenbeziehungen. Lead-Qualifizierung : Du führst strukturierte Erstgespräche, prüfst den Fit und identifizierst echte Verkaufschancen für unser Account Management. Showroom-Beratung: Du führst eigenständig Beratungstermine mit potenziellen und bestehenden B2B-Kunden in unserem Berliner Showroom durch, präsentierst unsere Möbel und empfiehlst passende Lösungen für ihre Anforderungen. Pipeline-Aufbau: Du arbeitest datenbasiert, pflegst Leads im CRM-System und trägst aktiv dazu bei, unsere Vertriebsprozesse kontinuierlich zu verbessern. Produkt- & Marktverständnis: Du eignest dir fundiertes Wissen über unser Portfolio und unsere Zielgruppen an, um im Erstkontakt auf Augenhöhe zu agieren. Team- & Sales-Support: Du unterstützt bei Kampagnen, Recherchen und Sonderprojekten und bekommst Einblicke in moderne B2B-Vertriebsstrategien. Du bist eingeschriebener Student, idealerweise im Bereich Wirtschaft. Welche Fachrichtung du genau verfolgst, ist für uns weniger entscheidend als deine Motivation und deine Begeisterung für Vertrieb. Du trittst offen, souverän und professionell auf, gehst aktiv auf Menschen zu und hast Freude daran, Kunden persönlich zu beraten und Produkte zu präsentieren. Auch am Telefon überzeugst du mit deiner kommunikativen Art und lässt dich von einem „Nein“ nicht verunsichern. Du konntest idealerweise bereits erst

listings.title: Creative Director (m/w/d)
listings.description: Du weißt, wie man aus Bildern eine echte Marke macht? Du hast ein unfehlbares Auge für Ästhetik, denkst Marke nicht in Silos, sondern als ganzheitliches Erlebnis und brennst darauf, den visuellen Auftritt des europäischen Marktführers im Teppich-E-Commerce entscheidend zu prägen? Dann ist das hier deine nächste Challenge: Bei benuta erwartet dich ein dynamisches Umfeld, in dem du vom ersten Tag an echte Ownership übernimmst. Als kreativer Kopf gestaltest du unseren Markenauftritt von der ersten Bildidee bis zur fertigen Kampagne auf einem echten Greenfield-Projekt mit – zukunftsorientiert, datengetrieben und mit viel Raum für deine Visionen. Deine Aufgaben Kreative Markenführung & Storytelling: Du entwickelst die kreative Leitidee und die Bildwelten unseres Markenauftritts kanalübergreifend, strategisch fundiert und mit einem starken Gespür für visuelles Storytelling visionär weiter. Strategisches Sparring: Du agierst als zentraler Sparringspartner für die Geschäftsführung, das Brand Management sowie unsere Design-, Content- und Marketingteams bei der kreativen Weiterentwicklung der Marke. Visuelle Exzellenz & Konsistenz: Du verantwortest die visuelle Qualität sowie die Stringenz aller Content Pieces – von großen Kampagnen über Shopinhalte bis hin zu Social-Media- und Videoformaten. Du stellst sicher, dass benuta über alle Kanäle hinweg visuell klar, wiedererkennbar und absolut markenkonform kommuniziert wird. Zukunftsorientierte Guidelines: Mit deiner Erfahrung sorgst du dafür, dass unsere Guidelines für Bildwelten und visuelle Kommunikation skalierbar, zukunftsfähig und State-of-the-Art bleiben. AI-Integration & Qualitätssicherung: Du arbeitest selbst mit KI-gestützten Tools (z. B. Weavy, Flora, Nano Banana Pro) und behältst souverän den Überblick, wenn unsere operativen Teams zunehmend KI-gestützt pflegen und produzieren. Du stellst sicher, dass Qualität und Markenbild dabei stets auf höchstem Niveau bleiben. Hands-on-Mentalität: Du übernimmst nicht nur die strat

listings.title: Werkstudent IT Consultant (m/w/d) Test Automation - Hybrid (Hamburg)
listings.description: Du suchst nicht nur einen Job sondern Wirkung? Und einen Ort, an dem du sie entfalten kannst. Willkommen bei NELTA. Zusammen gestalten wir die digitale Welt von morgen. Was uns verbindet, ist mehr als Expertise. Es ist eine Haltung, die auf Vertrauen, Verbindlichkeit und Partnerschaft basiert. Diese Werte prägen, wie wir denken, handeln und miteinander arbeiten. Nelta ist ein agiles IT-Beratungshaus mit Hauptniederlassung in Hamburg-Harvestehude. Wir bieten ein erstklassiges Leistungsportfolio, bestehend aus innovativen Lösungen, integrierten und ganzheitlichen Services, in den Bereichen QA, SAP und Software Development. Um weitere regionale als auch nationale Kundenprojekte zu realisieren, werden ab sofort IT Werkstudent : in (m/w/d) Software Testing gesucht mit Aussicht auf Übernahme in Festanstellung (unbefristet) Aufgaben DEINE AUFGABEN: Entwicklung und Pflege automatisierter Tests Durchführung von Code Reviews Qualitätssicherung in agilen und klassischen Vorgehensmodellen, von der Sichtung der Anforderungen und Testdesign bis hin zur Testplanung und Durchführung Überwachung des Testfortschritts und Reporting von Testergebnissen Erstellung von Test-Dokumentationen und Präsentation der Ergebnisse Kundenberatung bezüglich geeigneter qualitätssichernder Maßnahmen Definition und ggfs. Generierung von Testdaten Gepaart mit exzellenter Beratung und einem umfassenden Trainingsangebot sind wir das ideale IT-Beratungshaus für alle IT-Berater, die Großes erreichen und maximal vom digitalen Wandel profitieren möchten. Nelta lebt das New Work und gibt dies nicht einfach nur vor! Wir sind die richtige Anlaufstelle, wenn es um IT Consulting und Entwicklung geht. Qualifikation WAS DU MITBRINGST: Begeisterung und Verständnis für Technik: Studium der Informatik oder ähnlicher Studiengang und/oder ausgezeichnete Computerkenntnisse Kenntnisse in der Programmiersprache Python oder einer vergleichbaren Skriptsprache, und optional Java Grundkenntnisse in den Umgebungen Linux und Wind

listings.title: Berlin Office Manager/Team Assistant (m/f/d) – Part-Time (Temporary Position to Cover Parental Leave) - mrge
listings.description: Looking for an exciting challenge? Join us on our mission to become a global leader in commerce advertising and performance marketing. Our five companies digidip, shopping24, Sourceknowledge, Yieldkit, and MaxBounty make up the mrge Group. Together, we build technology platforms that aim to connect advertisers and publishers in a way that benefits both parties. We’re an international, multilingual team with flat hierarchies. Our teams work with a high degree of autonomy, both in our offices in Hamburg and Berlin and at our branches in Montreal and Ottawa. Our culture is characterized by trust, friendliness, and camaraderie, fostering a positive work environment. In close collaboration with our partners, we create ad formats that offer genuine relevance to our users, thereby driving more revenue. We’d love for you to join mrge as a part-time Office Manager/Team Assistant (m/f/d)! Your Tasks: Office Management: Order office supplies and technical equipment Serve as the point of contact for facility management, contractors, and cleaning staff Process incoming and outgoing mail Manage supplier relationships and contracts Team Assistance & Administration: Organize and prepare internal and external meetings Travel planning, booking, and travel expense accounting Administrative support as needed Create presentations and surveys Support in the onboarding of new team members Organize team and events Your Profile: Completed business apprenticeship or comparable qualification Professional experience in office management Proficiency with MS Office and Google Suite Proactive and independent work style Fluent in German and English Willingness to travel: Occasional travel between Hamburg and Berlin for team events and to provide administrative support at both locations Utmost discretion and trustworthiness when handling sensitive company, personnel, and financial data What We Offer: Play an active role in building an innovative, growth-oriented international group right from the s

listings.title: Senior Consultant IT & Development (Inhouse) (w/m/d)
listings.description: Senior Consultant IT & Development (Inhouse) (w/m/d) Ochtrup – Hybrid, bis zu 3 Tage Homeoffice, 50.000 € – 100.000 € + Weihnachtsgeld, Jubiläums- & Gesundheitsbonus Du willst nicht einfach von Kunde zu Kunde hüpfen, sondern echte IT-Projekte von Anfang bis Ende in einem Unternehmen führen – mit messbarem Impact auf 30 Standorte und 1.250 Mitarbeitende? Hier geht es nicht um externe Beratung mit PowerPoint-Handover. Hier geht es darum, als Inhouse-Consultant die E-Commerce-, ERP- und Cloud-Landschaft eines europäischen Marktführers aktiv mitzugestalten. Unser Kunde Unser Kunde ist ein wachsendes Großhandelsunternehmen im Bereich Gastronomie-Ausstattung mit rund 1.250 Mitarbeitenden, 30 Standorten in Europa und einem der größten Sortimente Europas. Seit 20 Jahren machen sie Gastronomie einfacher – mit Equipment, persönlicher Beratung und Lösungen, die im Alltag wirklich funktionieren. Das Umfeld ist schnell, leistungsorientiert und stark von Umsetzung geprägt. Keine endlosen Strategierunden ohne Ergebnis, sondern Menschen, die Verantwortung übernehmen und Dinge wirklich voranbringen. Das IT- & Development-Consulting-Team ist gerade im Aufbau – und genau hier wird jemand gesucht, der komplexe Projekte führt, Stakeholder zusammenbringt und technische Konzepte in echte Lösungen verwandelt. Warum diese Rolle spannend ist Du baust als Inhouse-Consultant strategische IT- und Digitalisierungsprojekte von der Anforderung bis zum Rollout – kein externes Hopping, echte Ownership Du arbeitest direkt mit Fachbereichen, Management und Entwicklungsteams zusammen Du bekommst echten Gestaltungsspielraum statt Konzernpolitik – gute Ideen brauchen keinen Titel, sie brauchen Menschen, die sie umsetzen Bestehende Systemlandschaft ist da, soll aber jetzt optimiert, erweitert und modernisiert werden Du kannst Architekturentscheidungen, Best Practices, Qualitätsstandards und moderne Methoden selbst mitgestalten Hoher Einfluss auf E-Commerce, ERP, Cloud und interne Plattformen – mit messbar

listings.title: Junior SEO / GEO Consultant (m/w/d) in einer besonderen Online Marketing Agentur
listings.description: Bei morefire brennen wir für Performance, aber vor allem für Menschen. Als inhabergeführte Agentur mit rund 115 leidenschaftlichen Köpfen in Köln begleiten wir unsere Kund:innen sowohl in Spezialdisziplinen als auch ganzheitlich übergreifend. Unser Antrieb: Echter Erfolg entsteht aus Teamwork, Kreativität und fundiertem Know-how. In einer daten- und toolgetriebenen Branche setzen wir ganz bewusst auf den Faktor Mensch. Wenn du Lust hast, in einem Umfeld zu arbeiten, in dem deine Persönlichkeit genauso zählt wie dein Fachwissen, dann bist du bei uns genau richtig. Aufgaben Deine Mission bei morefire SEO, GEO Strategie & Beratung: Gemeinsam mit deinen Kund:innen entwickelst du individuelle SEO und GEO Strategien und berätst sie bei der nachhaltigen Weiterentwicklung ihrer organischen Sichtbarkeit sowie ihrer Sichtbarkeit in KI gestützten Suchsystemen. KI Suche & Testing: Du analysierst die Sichtbarkeit von Marken und Inhalten in KI gestützten Suchsystemen, entwickelst strukturierte Test und Prompt Sets und leitest daraus konkrete Optimierungsmaßnahmen ab. Technisches SEO: Du analysierst Websites, identifizierst technische Optimierungspotenziale und leitest konkrete Handlungsempfehlungen ab. Außerdem prüfst du die technische Zugänglichkeit von Inhalten für Suchmaschinen und KI Systeme sowie Crawling, Rendering und Indexierung. Content & GEO: Du entwickelst Content Strategien weiter und optimierst Inhalte für klassische Suchmaschinen sowie KI gestützte Suchsysteme. Marken und Entitätsoptimierung: Du stärkst die digitale Eindeutigkeit, Autorität und Vertrauenswürdigkeit von Unternehmen, Marken, Produkten und Expertise über die eigene Website sowie relevante externe Quellen hinaus. Analysen & Monitoring: Du führst Markt, Wettbewerbs und SEO Analysen durch, beobachtest Trends und erkennst frühzeitig neue Potenziale. Umsetzung: Du planst, koordinierst und begleitest die Umsetzung relevanter SEO und GEO Maßnahmen für deine Kund:innen. Interdisziplinäre Zusammenarbeit: Gemein

listings.title: Patient Care Specialist
listings.description: This position will involve answering inbound calls for large hospital networks during our daytime shifts in a remote call center setting. Our company provides telephone answering, messaging, and alert services to physicians and medical facilities across the United States. If you are a self-motivated team player looking to build a career from the comfort of your own home, we might be the team you are looking for! You must live within the continental United States (+ Hawaii) to apply. We currently have full-time opportunities available. ALL SHIFTS ARE IN EASTERN STANDARD TIME (EST) Shift Availability Requirements Full-Time (appr. 30+ hours per week) Mondays thru Fridays 8am-6pm, EST Mondays thru Fridays 10am-7pm, EST M/T/W/F/Sat 9am-6pm, EST Thursdays thru Mondays 9am-6pm, EST Candidates must have a pleasant speaking voice, professional mannerisms, good computer skills, reliable internet, a quiet dedicated space to work from and work well in a fast-paced environment. Medical terminology and experience, either hands-on or clerical, required to apply. Familiarity with EMR systems and practices preferred. Minimum typing of 30 wpm is required and will be tested. Candidates must also have the following: Internet - Ethernet connection (hardwire internet) preferred Ping < 15 Download > 50 mbps Upload > 10 mbps STATLINX will provide equipment. If you think you are a good fit for our team, we would love to hear from you. Please include your resume with your application. Thanks and good luck! Responsibilities Manage call volume of 80-120 inbound calls daily in a timely and professional manner Follow communication prompts Identify callers’ needs, clarify information, research every issue, and provide solutions and/or alternatives Build sustainable relationships and engage customers by going the extra mile Keep records of all conversations in our call center database in a comprehensible way Meet personal/team qualitative and quantitative targets Skills Previous experience in a cu

listings.title: Senior Independent Software Developer
listings.description: You must be located in the Americas, Europe, or Israel to apply. A·Team is a VC-backed, stealth, application-only home on the internet for senior independent software builders to team up with hand-picked, high-growth companies on their next big thing. After talking with hundreds of independent engineers, designers, and product folks, we heard over and over that finding vetted, high-quality, consistent clients is hard, and projects are often too small to be rewarding. A·Team matches small teams of the most talented builders in the world with companies backed by a16z, YC, Softbank, General Catalyst, etc. on a contract basis for many of their most important initiatives. We quietly launched in May 2020, and have helped A·Teamers earn $85+ million since. As part of A·Team, you can expect: High-paying, meaningful missions with the most audacious companies sent your way; generally $90-$150+/hr, with vetted, fascinating clients doing work that matters. We're picky about who we partner with; new clients only come in via trusted referral. We've worked with Lyft, McGraw Hill, ClearCo, Pepsi, Walmart, the former CEO of Waze, the leading vaccine production software, several new unicorns we can't say here, and dozens of startups backed by a16z/YC/Softbank/Insight/Tiger/etc. Work alongside friends old & new: our niche is small/diverse product teams, since clients with larger budgets and higher-impact work tell us they want teams, not individuals. Of course, we keep friends together whenever we can. Full autonomy: say "no" to things that don't excite you. The most talented builders often juggle a few things at once, so there's never pressure to join an A·Team mission if you don't have the bandwidth. If we're no longer a fit, it's easy to leave or pause too. Small, curated, off-the-record gatherings: for conversations hard to have elsewhere. Long-term, we're creating micro-communities for the world's top builders to become friends around the things they care about. Keep 100% of what

listings.title: Senior Independent AI Engineer / Architect
listings.description: Senior Independent AI Engineer / Architect Remote | Americas, Europe, or Israel Most AI engineers can find work. Finding work worth doing is harder. A.Team is an invite-only network of senior AI engineers, ML engineers, and AI architects building production AI systems for startups, enterprises, and global companies. Since 2020, builders in the network have earned more than $200M working with companies including Lyft, Google X, HCA, Unilever, Sightful, D-ID, and others. The Work You'll join small teams solving real problems. Not demos. Not proof-of-concepts that never ship. Not another thin wrapper around an API. Recent work has included: AI-native products built from 0→1 Agent architectures and orchestration systems Enterprise AI deployments Retrieval, evaluation, and reliability infrastructure LLM-powered workflows and products Machine learning platforms operating at scale You'll work directly with founders, CTOs, and product leaders, helping shape both technical direction and execution. Why Builders Join The best opportunities rarely make it to the open market. A.Team exists to solve that. No bidding. No prospecting. No race to the bottom. Just ambitious companies, difficult problems, and experienced peers. Who Thrives Here People who have already shipped. Engineers who have deployed AI systems into production, understand the tradeoffs behind the hype, and know how to turn technical complexity into business value. What matters is a track record of building and shipping. The Details Typical rates: $120-$170/hr Remote You keep 100% of your rate Not a Fit Early-career engineers People without production AI experience Small gig seekers Developers focused primarily on simple AI wrappers or templated implementations Apply Tell us what you've built. 👉 build.a.team/apply-ai . We'll take it from there.

listings.title: Head of Marketing & Communications
listings.description: We are hiring a Head of Marketing & Communications to tell the garden3d story across the internet, from wherever in the world you happen to be. More details if you check our original job posting link About garden3d We are worker owned creative collective, innovating on everything from brands and IRL communities to IoT devices and cross platform apps. We share profit, open source everything, spin out new businesses, and invest in exciting ideas through financial and/or in-kind contributions. Our client roster includes Google , Stripe , Figma , Hinge , Black Socialists in America , ACLU , Pratt , Parsons , Mozilla , The Nobel Prize , MIT , Gnosis , Etsy & Gagosian . We’re the software team behind innovative products like The Light Phone & Mill , and we operate a global, decentralized community space collective called Index Space . We think of our garden3d as collective for creative people, prioritizing a happy, talented, and diverse studio culture. We work on projects that bring value to our world, and we balance deep care for the work we do with a genuine curiosity about life outside of our jobs. Sanctuary Computer — Development At Sanctuary Computer we’re building a different type of technology shop – one that prioritizes close collaboration between the client and the craftsperson. Our projects range from design-forward websites, to robust web apps, to native mobile development. XXIX — Design When we started XXIX in 2013, we set out to create a different kind of design studio and we’ve thrived because we continually ask what a creative practice can be. We’re building a radically different kind of organization that values autonomy, growth, transparency, and shared responsibility. Index Space — Community A network of physical spaces all around the world, Index provides space for the exchange of knowledge and tools. We nurture trust within the creative community through generosity and abundance of ideas and care. garden3d TK — Media At garden3d, we’re in the early stag

listings.title: Inside Sales Contractor
listings.description: About Us We are a financial services start up focusing on helping to improve consumer credit profiles. We are currently seeking KPI driven sales representatives looking to earn up to 45K in their first year while working remotely. We offer comprehensive training and continuous sales coaching to help you meet your financial goals. During our training period we offer a guaranteed training stipend while our trainees are acclimating to the position (*see weekly pay below). If you are a seasoned sales professional looking for the autonomy of a remote position combined with great compensation, we want to hear from you! Compensation Structure This role is 100% commission-based , which means your earning potential is unlimited. In addition, we regularly offer competitive performance-based bonuses to reward hard work and results. Training Period (Weeks 1–4) We invest in your success and want to make sure you’re supported as you get up to speed: Week 1: Commission-only (a chance to start earning right away while learning the ropes). Weeks 2–4: Guaranteed training stipend of $1,000 total – or your commission if it’s higher. You’ll always receive whichever amount benefits you most. Week 2: $250 guaranteed minimum Week 3: $325 guaranteed minimum Week 4: $425 guaranteed minimum By the end of training, you’ll have the skills to maximize commissions, with the safety net of a guaranteed base during your ramp-up period. Post Training Period: Average first year OTE: 25K-35K (US) Annually Top Rep first year OTE: 35K-45K (US) Annually *The above is the average pay you can expect, however, there is unlimited earning potential for those who are financially motivated top performers looking to exceed sales targets. What will you be doing? Educating inbound callers on their credit standing by providing consultations with the goal of enrolling them in one of our services should they be a good fit. listings.title: Online Data Analyst Canada (French Language) (C)
listings.description: Are you a detail-oriented individual with a passion for research and a good understanding of national and local geography? This freelance opportunity allows you to work at your own pace and from the comfort of your own home. A Day in the Life of an Online Data Analyst: In this role, you will be working on a project aimed at enhancing the content and quality of digital maps that are used by millions of people worldwide Completing research and evaluation tasks in a web-based environment such as verifying and comparing data, and determining the relevance and accuracy of information. Join us today and be part of a dynamic and innovative team that is making a difference in the world! TELUS Digital AI Community Our global AI Community is a vibrant network of 1 million+ contributors from diverse backgrounds who help our customers collect, enhance, train, translate, and localize content to build better AI models. Become part of our growing community and make an impact supporting the machine learning models of some of the world’s largest brands. Qualification path No previous professional experience is required to apply to this role, however, working on this project will require you to pass the basic requirements and go through a standard assessment process. This is a part-time long-term project and your work will be subject to our standard quality assurance checks during the term of this agreement. Basic Requirements Full Professional Proficiency in French language Being a resident in Canada for the last 5 consecutive years and having familiarity with current and historical business, media, sport, news, social media, and cultural affairs in Canada. listings.title: Freelance Writer
listings.description: Our organization is seeking content writers to create articles and blog posts on a variety of topics. The rate of pay is $20 per 100 words (this comes out to approximately $100 per article or $50 per hour). listings.description: Who We Are Workada creates high-quality labeled data for advanced technology systems. A Place to Do Meaningful Work Data labeling may sound simple, but it plays an important role in improving the technology people use every day. listings.title: Rippling
listings.description: The verdict Rippling is one of the strongest products you can buy if you run HR, IT, and finance as connected systems, and the review data backs that up: 4.8 across more than 14,000 G2 reviews and 4.9 on Capterra. The onboarding automation that provisions payroll, benefits, IT access, and a device in one move is the standout, and it earns its keep. Go in clear-eyed about two things: the modular, quote-based pricing stacks faster than people expect, and the first-week learning curve is real. Key features One employee record that drives everything Hire someone once and the record propagates everywhere: payroll, benefits, device provisioning, app access, and offboarding all read from it, so a department change updates downstream automatically. Automated payroll and tax compliance Rippling calculates payroll taxes and files them with the correct federal, state, and local agencies, supports multi-entity and global payroll for employees and contractors, and stores electronic W-2s and 1099s. One-click onboarding and offboarding A single flow sends offer letters, enrolls payroll and benefits, ships a device, and grants app logins; offboarding runs it in reverse, revoking access and triggering device returns. Benefits administration with payroll sync Over 500 EDI and API carrier integrations, integrated HSA/FSA/commuter accounts with automatic payroll-deduction sync, COBRA and ACA automation, and bring-your-own-broker support alongside Rippling's PEO and brokerage. 600+ out-of-the-box integrations Connects QuickBooks, Xero, NetSuite, Guideline for 401(k), Checkr for background checks, plus identity and productivity tools, with real user provisioning, attribute mapping, and cross-app workflow automation. Modular HR, IT, and Finance products Buy the core Rippling Platform, then add only the products you need across HR (Payroll, Benefits, Learning, Performance), IT (Identity, Device, Inventory), and Finance (Corporate Cards, Expenses, Bill Pay). listings.title: Head of People
listings.description: About Bizee Bizee has helped nearly two million entrepreneurs start and run their businesses. Now we are building what comes next: an AI-powered Entrepreneur Operating System that helps founders launch, operate, stay compliant, and grow with less friction and more confidence. We are profitable, founder-led, and operating at a clear inflection point. The next chapter requires a stronger operating system for how we hire, lead, communicate, develop talent, and scale execution across the company. The Opportunity We are looking for a Head of People & Organizational Effectiveness to serve as a strategic partner to the President and executive team. This is not a maintenance HR role. It is a builder-operator role for someone who can create clarity, raise the talent bar, strengthen the leadership layer, and build the people systems that help Bizee scale without unnecessary complexity or organizational drag. As Bizee grows and transforms, one of the most important responsibilities of this role will be building and protecting a high talent bar. We are not simply adding headcount; we are intentionally increasing talent density across the company. This leader will help ensure we hire high-caliber builders, operators, and leaders who raise the standard, strengthen execution, and fit the culture we are building. You will help design how Bizee hires, onboards, develops, manages, communicates, and performs as we move into our next stage of growth. What You Will Own Partner with the President and executive team on org design, leadership effectiveness, talent quality, succession, performance, and cross-functional friction Design and protect Bizee's talent bar. Build the hiring standards, role scorecards, interview calibration, decision rules, and leadership alignment required to consistently identify high-caliber talent as the company scales. Job Summary: As an Influencer Talent Manager, you will be responsible for managing the careers of our creators, helping them grow their audience and monetise their content. Using our in-house software and your own expertise, you will also be responsible for negotiating deals with brands/record labels and developing content strategies for our clients. What Youâll Do: Manage & Scale Creators : Oversee influencer portfolios and help talent grow their platform presence while securing brand deals. Talent Acquisition : Scout and sign new creators, focusing on emerging and established influencers. Foster Brand Relationships : Build and nurture strong partnerships with brands and agencies to book top talent for campaigns. Strategic Growth : Collaborate with internal teams to shape the overall strategy and expand Grailâs talent roster. Autonomous & Flexible Work : Thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment while having the flexibility to work ind

listings.title: Social Media Content Creator
listings.description: Company Description Here's the problem we're obsessed with: when you want to do something in your free time, you open TikTok or you ask ChatGPT and both send you to the exact same place as everyone else. The same viral pasta spot, the same rooftop, the same top-10 list. The algorithm flattens a whole city into five places and funnels everyone into them. But there's no single Milan! There are as many as there are pairs of eyes looking at it, and yours looks nothing like the top-10 everyone else gets fed. Hic finds your version of the city and lets you live it in one tap. We're live in Milan, Florence, Berlin, London, Madrid, and Zurich. Our content fights the same fight: not "5 things to do in Milan" (that's the enemy), but the specific, the hidden, the strange. Restaurants worth crossing town for, museums that aren't boring, bars, corners, and the stories nobody told you. The stuff that makes someone feel like the city was built for them. That's what you'd be making. Role Description We don't want to hand you a template. We want someone to own our TikTok voice and run with it: your ideas, your style, your hooks. You'll have the creative freedom to make people fall in love with Hic, however you see it, working hand in hand with the founder. You'd make around 4 short videos a week, with room to grow: shoot Milan on the ground, and edit footage for the other cities. This is paid freelance, project-based to start, part-time. A young app whose whole voice you get to shape. The only rule: it's about real places people can actually go. What it's not: a corporate content job or an unpaid "exposure" gig. Qualifications You are original: (you bring ideas, you've got taste and a point of view). You live on TikTok and it shows (you get hooks and retention in your bones). You have an account that actually posts. Fast in CapCut (or whatever gets it done). Based in Milan, and you can go shoot on location. You own the creative, but you're happy to shape strategy together with the t

listings.description: Simon & Schuster was named to Forbes magazine list of America's Best Mid-Size Employers 2022. Simon & Schuster is a global leader in general interest publishing, dedicated to providing the best in fiction and nonfiction for readers of all ages, and in all printed, digital and audio formats. Its distinguished roster of authors includes many of the world's most popular and widely recognized writers, and winners of the most prestigious literary honors and awards. It is home to numerous well-known imprints and divisions such as Simon & Schuster, Scribner, Atria Books, Gallery Books, Pocket Books, Adams Media, Simon & Schuster Children's Publishing and Simon & Schuster Audio and international companies in Australia, Canada, India and the United Kingdom, and proudly brings the works of its authors to readers in more than 200 countries and territories. For more information visit our website at www.simonandschuster.com. Simon & Schuster is seeking an Interior Book Designer to design and layout fiction and nonfiction books in the adult division. This person will be involved in, on average, 50 projects each year. listings.title: Project Management Officer
listings.description: Project Objectives: Support the IT Portfolio Governance function by ensuring projects are delivered on schedule, within budget, and in accordance with governance standards. The role is responsible for coordinating project governance activities, monitoring project costs and benefits, maintaining project documentation, and facilitating communication across project stakeholders. Key Responsibilities: Portfolio Governance Maintain project governance documentation and ensure project documentation checklists are up to date. Coordinate regular project meetings and prepare meeting materials. Organize monthly Portfolio Steering Committee (SteerCo) meetings. Monitor and review monthly project status across the portfolio. Coordinate with business users, Project Managers, and internal teams to ensure effective communication and alignment. Project Cost Management Monitor project cost trackers and ensure spending remains within the approved budget. Consolidate and prepare monthly project cost reports. Highlight cost variances and escalate potential risks when necessary. Project Benefit Tracking Maintain project benefit documentation and repository. Track, consolidate, and validate project benefit realization. Coordinate monthly benefit realization meetings with relevant stakeholders. Project Coordination & Governance Ensure project activities are executed according to the agreed timeline without unnecessary scope changes. Remind Team Leads of upcoming resource contract expirations to support workforce planning. Support the Portfolio Governance Lead with day-to-day governance activities. Perform additional ad hoc tasks based on business priorities. Required Skills Minimum 2 years of experience in IT Project Management, PMO, Project Governance, or IT Portfolio Management. Strong understanding of Software Development Life Cycle ( SDLC ), including Agile and Waterfall methodologies. Experience in project governance, PMO processes, project reporting, and portfolio management. Knowledg

We do not employ machine learning technologies during this phase as we believe every human deserves attention from another human. We do not think machines can evaluate your application quite like our seasoned recruiting professionalsâevery person is unique. We promise to give your candidacy a fair and detailed assessment. We may then invite you to submit a video interview for the review of the hiring manager. This video interview is often followed by a test or short project that allows us to determine whether you will be a good fit for the team. At this point, we will invite you to interview with our hiring manager and/or the interview team. Please note: We do not conduct interviews via text message, Telegram, etc. and we never hire anyone into our organization without having met you face-to-face (or via Zoom). listings.title: React Native Engineer
listings.description: About us At HelpBnk, we donât just build software; we build infrastructure for a future where everyone has the agency to follow their dreams. Co-founded by Simon Squibb, we are on a mission to Free Humanity from the trap of unfulfilling work and the looming challenges of AI-driven automation. We are a high-growth startup under the Dream Inc umbrella, creating a social platform and business-starting tools that empower people to take control of their lives. If you are tired of "just a job" and want to fight for something that matters, read on. Our Culture Ownership. We're small, so there's a lot of open ground. If you spot something broken, you're the one who gets to fix it. That's the good part and the hard part. Openness. Problems get named early, including our own. We'd rather have an uncomfortable conversation on Monday than a bad quarter. AI as a tool . We build with agentic AI (Claude Code, Cursor, and whatever comes next). We're not looking for people who let it write the code unsupervised, or for people who won't touch it. We're looking for people who've worked out where it helps and where it lies to you. Interesting problems . The work here is genuinely unsolved in places. If you like that, you'll like it here. If you'd rather have a well-defined roadmap and a clear spec, we're probably not the right fit for eachother. The Challenge We are in a pivotal phase of our journey. HelpBnk is transitioning its mobile experience from a web to a full native React Native application. Simultaneously, we are revamping our UX. As a Senior Engineer, you will have a massive impact on the future of our mobile development as we expand into new countries and verticals. What Youâll Do Lead the Transition: Architect and build high-performance, scalable mobile applications from the ground up using React Native (TypeScript). listings.title: UGC Creator
listings.description: The hard center of this role: turning real Ren tasks (the calls, the cancellations, the 47-minute holds) into content that travels on its own. One post that reads as an ad costs the deadpan permanently, so the register isn't a style choice here. It's the distribution. T-SHAPED, DEEP IN AT LEAST ONE Short-form video. Shooting and cutting phone-native video from real raw material: call recordings, screen captures, field footage. Hooks that earn the first second, payoffs that earn the repost. The deadpan register. Writing and performing flat institutional comedy â the situation is deranged, the delivery never is. If you can't do dry, nothing else transfers. Editorial artifacts. Turning call data into things people screenshot and cite: the Cancellation Index, hold-time leaderboards, "dear [institution]" letters. Content that holds up as journalism, not just posts. Organic distribution. Knowing why something traveled and proving it with numbers instead of vibes. No paid amplification, ever. Paid-campaign instincts corrupt the signal and fail the swap test. OUR STACK We shoot phone-first and cut in whatever you're fastest in, off a growing archive of real call recordings and a locked brand system. There is no ad budget and there won't be one. Not knowing our exact tools isn't a dealbreaker; taste and reps are. Working hours vary and you MUST be able to cover operational requirements including early and evening shifts as required. You will be a key driver in providing that âwowâ factor when customers first step on board their vessel. It will be your responsibility to deliver superior cleaning excellence to ensure the outside of our yachts meet the standard that give our guests that exceptional first impression. What You Will Be Doing Carrying out a full clean of the yacht from the bridge deck to engine bays, including a rinse, soap wash, and chamois, followed by detailing of the yacht. Cleaning and detailing f all lockers (gas, anchor and water locker), cleaning inside and all rims and outside edges. Cleaning and detailing f the helm station including winch handle pockets, cup holders and dorades Buffing f the yachts Cleaning all rubbing strakes and make sure all exhaust utlets are spotless Reporting any defects noticed whilst cleaning to the technical manager Utilizing chemicals in a safe and cost-effective way Suggesting improvements for cleaning techniques Any other reasonable duties as assigned by your line manager, including supporting with other departments, and cleaning of other areas. listings.title: Care Specialist
listings.description: About Empathy Empathy is transforming the way families navigate lifeâs most difficult times - from the loss of a loved one to other major life transitions. By combining technology with compassionate human care, we bring clarity, comfort, and peace of mind when it matters most. We partner with leading employers, insurers, and financial institutions to deliver meaningful, human-centric support at scale. Today, Empathy supports over 50 million people across the US, Canada, and the UK. Backed by top-tier investors including General Catalyst, Index Ventures, Adams Street, Aleph and EntreÃ© Capital. We've raised over $160 million to date, including a $72 million Series C, to expand our impact and scale our mission worldwide. About the Team: At the heart of this mission is our Care Team - a group of dedicated professionals with backgrounds in social work, grief support, crisis response, and customer care. They provide compassionate, expert guidance via phone, chat, and email, always balancing emotional sensitivity with operational excellence. Role Overview: The Care Specialist (Overnight Shift) role is integral to our 24/7 operations, providing live chat and phone support to families navigating loss, short-term disability leave, and other challenging life events. Working independently during overnight hours, youâll offer first-in-class care by responding to live chats, handling inbound phone calls, and completing a variety of task-based support requests. This includes detailed research to locate resources, vendors, or service providers tailored to each userâs needs. Weâre looking for someone who is self-motivated, tech-comfortable, and able to work with care and consistency during overnight hours. As our business continues to grow and evolve, so too will the responsibilities associated with this role. Adaptability and willingness to grow are essential, both for our team and the families we support. Working Hours: This is a full-time, fixed overnight shift: Monday,

listings.title: Voice Actor
listings.description: Gritter Francona is looking for a Voice Actor that is responsible for providing professional voice performances for animated educational videos supporting the Veterans Health Administration (VHA) National Center for PTSD. The Voice Actor delivers narration and character dialogue that effectively communicates evidence-based information about trauma, posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD), effective treatments, and co-occurring conditions in a manner that is engaging, compassionate, and accessible to diverse audiences. Working collaboratively with project managers, video producers, scriptwriters, subject matter experts (SMEs), directors, and Government stakeholders, the Voice Actor interprets approved scripts to produce clear, authentic, and emotionally appropriate performances that support the National Center for PTSD's mission of increasing awareness, reducing stigma, and encouraging treatment engagement. All performances must reflect a serious yet hopeful tone and demonstrate sensitivity to individuals who have experienced trauma. Key Responsibilities Perform narration and character voice recordings for animated educational videos and related multimedia products Interpret approved scripts to communicate complex behavioral health and clinical information in a clear, natural, and engaging manner Deliver voice performances that accurately reflect the intended tone, pacing, and emotional context of educational materials while maintaining scientific credibility and professionalism Adapt vocal style, pacing, and delivery to meet the needs of diverse audiences, including Veterans, trauma survivors, caregivers, healthcare providers, and the general public Collaborate with project managers, video producers, directors, scriptwriters, subject matter experts (SMEs), and Government stakeholders during recording sessions to achieve project objectives Participate in recording sessions, rehearsals, retakes, and revisions as required to ensure high-quality deliverables Pronounce medi

listings.title: Scriptwriter
listings.description: Gritter Francona is looking for a Scriptwriter that will be responsible for researching, developing, and writing engaging, evidence-based scripts for animated educational videos supporting the Veterans Health Administration (VHA) National Center for PTSD. The role transforms scientific evidence, clinical protocols, and subject matter expert (SME) input into clear, accurate, and accessible narratives that educate Veterans, trauma survivors, caregivers, healthcare providers, and the general public about trauma, posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD), evidence-based treatments, and co-occurring conditions. Working collaboratively with project managers, clinicians, SMEs, instructional designers, and production staff, the Scriptwriter develops compelling stories, dialogue, narration, and visual direction that communicate complex behavioral health concepts in plain language. Scripts must maintain a serious yet hopeful tone, encourage treatment engagement, and reflect the National Center for PTSD's commitment to scientific integrity, accessibility, and sensitivity to the diverse experiences of individuals affected by trauma. Key Responsibilities Research, write, and revise scripts for animated educational videos that communicate evidence-based information related to trauma, PTSD, effective treatments, and co-occurring conditions Translate scientific literature, clinical protocols, and technical information into clear, accurate, and engaging scripts using plain language principles appropriate for public audiences Develop storylines, dialogue, narration, scene descriptions, and visual cues that effectively communicate educational content while maintaining audience engagement Collaborate with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs), clinicians, project managers, Government stakeholders, and production teams to ensure scripts accurately reflect current clinical evidence and approved treatment guidance Ensure all scripts maintain a serious, compassionate, and hopeful tone that encourages t

listings.title: Brand Manager
listings.description: About Cazcanes Tequila Cazcanes Tequila is an award-winning ultra-premium tequila brand built on authenticity, craftsmanship, and an uncompromising commitment to quality. Produced using traditional methods, certified organic agave, and natural spring water, Cazcanes has earned a reputation as one of the fastest-growing luxury tequila brands in the United States. As we continue to expand nationally and internationally, we're looking for a collaborative, creative, and execution-focused Brand Manager to help bring our brand to life across every consumer and trade touchpoint. Position Summary Reporting to the Chief Marketing Officer, the Brand Manager is responsible for executing the Cazcanes brand strategy across consumer, trade, and experiential marketing channels. This role serves as a key member of the marketing leadership team, partnering closely with Sales, Brand Advocacy, Operations, Creative partners, and distributors to deliver marketing initiatives that build brand awareness, deepen consumer engagement, and support commercial growth. The Brand Manager will translate strategic priorities into exceptional execution by managing integrated marketing campaigns, trade marketing programs, experiential activations, packaging initiatives, CRM programs, and sales enablement tools. This role requires a strong blend of creativity, organization, collaboration, and commercial thinking, with the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment. Partner with the Chief Marketing Officer to execute annual brand marketing plans that support company growth objectives. listings.title: Backend Engineer - POS
listings.description: SumUp's Point-of-Sale (POS) solution empowers cafes, shops, bars, hair salons, and other businesses to operate efficiently and grow. It offers a wide range of features, including product catalogs, inventory management, business analytics, compliance support, and loyalty tools. As a Backend Engineer in the Orders & Sales or Catalog Platform team, you will build the engine powering core infrastructure for over 4 million businesses worldwide. Whether you are architecting global sales APIs or scaling item management systems, your work is central to the SumUp ecosystem. The Orders & Sales team builds high-performance APIs and receipt engines that unify transaction and sales data, utilizing an AI-native mindset and extreme collaboration. Meanwhile, the Catalog Platform team owns the backend for item management, variants, categories, and taxes, focusing on high-stakes reliability and core POS infrastructure scaling. What you'll do Develop and evolve high-performance backend services and APIs using Kotlin and Spring Boot . Design and maintain robust data schemas and event-driven integrations (Kafka) to handle complex transaction and catalog data at scale. Write clean, well-tested, production-grade code and contribute meaningfully to code reviews and team rituals. Collaborate with mobile and product teams to ship end-to-end features with a focus on performance and data consistency. Engage in daily pair programming to solve complex concurrency challenges and maintain high architectural standards. Take full ownership of the development lifecycle, including managing CI/CD pipelines and monitoring service health in production. Actively use and experiment with AI coding agents to automate repetitive tasks and increase shipping velocity. Refactor and migrate mission-critical domain logic to centralize and simplify the "Sales" and "Catalog" experiences across the ecosystem. listings.title: Team Lead Content und Social Media (m/w/d) - 100% remote, Vollzeit
listings.description: Über Endo Health GmbH Die Endo Health GmbH entwickelt digitale Gesundheitslösungen, um die Versorgung von Frauen nachhaltig zu verbessern. Unsere Vision ist eine Welt, in der jede Frau Zugang zu einer personalisierten, wirksamen und digitalen Gesundheitsversorgung hat. Mit unseren Anwendungen helfen wir Betroffenen, ihre Gesundheit selbstbestimmt zu gestalten und schließen gleichzeitig bestehende Versorgungslücken im Gesundheitssystem. Dabei leisten wir einen aktiven Beitrag, die Frauengesundheit neu zu denken und langfristig zu stärken. Team Lead Content und Social Media (m/w/d) Als Team Lead Content und Social Media übernimmst du die Verantwortung für unser vierköpfiges Content- und Social Media Team. Dein Verantwortungsbereich umfasst zwei zentrale Säulen: Zum einen entwickelst du unsere organischen Social Media-Kanäle strategisch und operativ weiter und baust nachhaltig relevante Communities auf. Zum anderen verantwortest du die gesamte Content-Produktion für Organic und Paid – von der Ideenentwicklung über UGC bis hin zu performanten Paid Creatives.Gemeinsam mit deinem Team entwickelst du eine skalierbare Content Engine, die hochwertige Inhalte effizient produziert und in enger Zusammenarbeit mit dem Performance Marketing zum Wachstumsmotor des Unternehmens wird. Dabei verbindest du strategisches Denken mit operativer Umsetzung und hast bereits erfolgreich KI-gestützte Content-Prozesse aufgebaut und in Teams etabliert. Dein Ziel ist es, unsere Content-Produktion mithilfe von KI deutlich zu skalieren und effizienter zu machen, ohne dass Kreativität, Markenqualität oder der menschliche Touch verloren gehen. Du berichtest direkt an den Head of Marketing und arbeitest eng mit dem Performance-Marketing-Manager sowie weiteren interdisziplinären Teams zusammen. Aufgaben Deine Aufgaben Führung, Coaching und Weiterentwicklung unseres vierköpfigen Content und Social Media-Teams Verantwortung für die Content- und Social Media-Strategie für unsere verschiedenen Apps Aufbau

listings.description: Digital Advertising Trainee (m/w/d) – München Du hast erste Berufserfahrung im Online Marketing gesammelt und möchtest dich weiterentwickeln? Dann bist du bei uns richtig. listings.title: Praktikant im Bereich Business Development (m/w/d)
listings.description: Intro Zur gehören eine Vielzahl von Unternehmen sowie eine Klinik, die alle dazu beitragen, unserer Vision von einer gesünderen Welt näher zu kommen. Unser Ziel ist es, durch präventive Dienstleistungsmedizin, eHealth und Public Health eine führende und wegweisende Rolle im Gesundheitssystem von morgen einzunehmen. Dabei setzen wir auf smarte Logistik, Digitalisierung, Diagnostik und individuelle Prävention. Wir denken Gesundheitsversorgung und Diagnostik neu und hinterfragen dazu stets den Status Quo. Ein neuer Pfeiler dieser Vision ist : Mit unserem telemedizinischen Service gestalten wir den Zugang zu medizinischem Cannabis für Menschen mit chronischen Beschwerden so einfach, niedrigschwellig, erschwinglich und sicher wie möglich, und wollen dabei unterstützen, Symptome zu lindern und die Lebensqualität nachhaltig zu verbessern. Du willst im Venture Development durchstarten und konntest bereits erste Erfahrungen sammeln? Dann bewirb dich jetzt für ein 6-monatiges Praktikum und werde ein zentraler Akteur in der Entwicklung eines neuen HealthTech Ventures. Bringe deinen unternehmerischen Geist ein und hilf uns, innovativen Zugang zu Gesundheit zu ermöglichen. Deine Mission bei uns Du entdeckst durch Markt- und Wettbewerbsanalysen ungenutzte Wachstumspotenziale und entwickelst Strategien, um diese Chancen zu nutzen. Du unterstützt den Aufbau und die Pflege wertvoller Partnerschaften und bist aktiv an der Identifizierung und Umsetzung von Kooperationen beteiligt. Du unterstützt bei der Entwicklung von Marketing und Sales Strategien, insbesondere für unser Projekt GreenMedical Du gestaltest und optimierst Inhalte für unsere Kommunikationskanäle, um unsere Zielgruppen effektiv und kreativ zu erreichen. Du nutzt deine analytischen Fähigkeiten zur Prozessoptimierung und übernimmst vom ersten Tag an eigenverantwortlich Projekte. Was du mitbringen solltest Entrepreneurial Spirit: Du hast ein starkes unternehmerisches Mindset, bist kreativ und scheust dich nicht davor, neue

listings.title: Senior Business Developer

We help millions make smarter spending decisions across discovery, evaluation, and (re-)purchase by connecting people with the right brands and retailers. listings.title: Senior Software Developer (m/f/d) Java/Kotlin with Spring Boot
listings.description: Do you want to build software that truly makes an impact? At etalytics, we develop intelligent energy management solutions that help industrial companies reduce energy consumption, lower CO₂ emissions, and cut costs. With our AI- and data-driven products, we actively contribute to a more sustainable future. As a Senior Software Developer, you will join our backend team in Darmstadt and work on our etaONE® platform. You will take technical ownership, actively contribute to architectural decisions, and support the growth of our engineering team with your experience. If you care about clean code, modern architectures, and meaningful software, you will feel right at home with us. Tasks: Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend features – from REST APIs to the persistence layer – using Spring Boot with Java and/or Kotlin Actively contribute to the evolution of our cloud-native microservice architecture Continuously improve our system landscape using modern technologies such as Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and asynchronous pub/sub mechanisms Provide technical and functional input for new product and solution ideas, including architecture and technology decisions Ensure high code quality and long-term maintainability through test-driven development, automated testing (e.g., JUnit, Mockito, MockK), and static code analysis Mentor and support junior developers while fostering a strong engineering culture focused on learning and knowledge sharing Collaborate closely with product management, developers, and domain experts to translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions Actively participate in internal knowledge exchange and continuously stay up to date with backend, cloud, and software engineering trends Must-have: At least 5 years of professional experience in backend software development with Spring Boot or comparable frameworks Strong proficiency in Java and/or Kotlin Experience in building RESTful APIs as well as working with SQL and data

listings.title: Tech & AI Specialist (Marketing Agency)
listings.description: Hey, I'm Yannic, co-founder of agencro, a CRO and direct-response agency for e-commerce brands: advertorials, landing pages, online shops and email for our clients - plus our own brands, where we also run paid ads ourselves. We work AI-first: AI produces the volume, a small team with real taste directs and finishes it. Small remote team, short paths, your work goes live fast. Our work runs on landing pages, advertorials, online shops and A/B tests. This role owns the technical side of that: you build and maintain what the team ships, and you bring AI into the daily workflow. We are not looking for a narrow specialist. What matters is broad tech and AI understanding - someone who can move across page builders, Shopify, code and AI tools and reliably get things live. Tasks Build pages: landing pages, advertorials and funnels - in page builders (e.g. LanderLab) and directly in HTML/CSS/JS. Shopify: theme edits, sections and storefront changes for our client shops and own brands - a core part of the job. A/B tests: set up test variants cleanly and QA them before they go live. Work AI-first: AI coding tools and LLM workflows are your default way of building - broad understanding beats memorized syntax. Keep things running: bugs, small feature requests, technical QA - reliably and without drama. Requirements Who we're NOT looking for Narrow specialists who only know one builder or one framework. AI sceptics. AI tools are the default here, not a gimmick. People who need a full spec for every small task. Who we ARE looking for Solid web fundamentals (HTML/CSS/JS) and comfort with APIs. Shopify experience (themes/Liquid) - important, not optional. Broad tech and AI understanding: you use AI coding tools daily and figure new things out on your own. You work cleanly with Git/GitHub. Reliable and self-managing: you deliver what you commit to, and you communicate clearly. Nice to have Tracking and analytics setup (pixels, events) - or the code knowledge to figure it out. Experie

listings.title: Account Executive - Netherlands (f/m/d)

Your mission As an Account Executive for the Netherlands, you will drive Instagrid's growth in your region by winning new customers and expanding existing accounts. You will own the full sales cycle, build lasting relationships with key stakeholders, and act as the face of Instagrid in your market — bringing clean energy to professionals who need it most. Your Impact Own the full sales cycle from first contact to close - you drive revenue and set the pace Build and grow a complex, multilocation key account portfolio, identifying and reaching the right decision-makers independently Shape how Instagrid goes to market in the Netherlands - your insights directly influence strategy, product, and marketing Develop a strong, sustainable pipeline by becoming a trusted long-term partner to your accounts Engage key opinion leaders and industry influencers to put Instagrid on the map where it matters Feed real market intelligence back into the business - on customers, competition, trends, and product gaps 5+ years in B2B sales, ideally with high-quality hardware or technical products A proven track record closing complex deals and managing multilocation accounts Experience coordinating or leading a national sales team Sharp communicator and confident negotiator - comfortable with senior stakeholders Customer-first mindset with a professional, credible presence in the field Fluent in Dutch and English Business or engineering background - degree or equivalent experience Your benefits A competitive salary with a fixed and variable component Flexible work schedules and remote work A car allowance 30 days of paid vacation Up to 5 special leave days The opportunity to join a company at the cutting edge of its field

listings.title: Projektmanager:in Großbatteriespeicher

Hast du Lust, diesen Markt mit uns zu gestalten und in einem schnell wachsenden Unternehmen viel Verantwortung zu übernehmen? Dann freuen wir uns auf deine Bewerbung!
